channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Correspondents dinner shooter case raises concerns about security on trains
item.description: Union representatives and safety consultants say the case of the man charged with attempting to assassinate President Donald Trump at a media dinner is the latest example of someone allegedly trying to use the country’s passenger trains to smuggle guns for an attack.

item.title: Anonymous tip system started in wake of Sandy Hook shooting has fielded nearly 400,000 reports
King Charles III and Queen Camilla visiting 9/11 Memorial and other NYC landmarks as part of US trip
